overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character traversing a snowy mountain pass during a storm. The weather clears to reveal a massive crimson moon, and a large wolf appears and approaches the character from the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain pass during a blizzard

agents.ego_description: armored character with a large round shield walking steadily through deep snow between rocky cliffs

entered.detail: snow-covered valley path winding between steep rock faces
steep snow-dusted rock face forming the left wall of the pass
steep rocky cliff with snow patches forming the right wall
dark swirling storm clouds and heavy fog obscuring the sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy mountain pass enveloped in a dense blizzard. Dark storm clouds block the sky, and steep rocky cliffs flank both sides of the path. Visibility is low as snow swirls around the armored figure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge under a giant moon

events.description: storm clouds part and dissipate, revealing a massive crimson-purple moon in the sky
character pauses and turns to look up at the revealed moon

agents.ego_description: character stops walking to gaze up at the massive moon, then continues forward along the ridge

entered.detail: massive purple-red celestial body dominating the night sky with visible surface details
crumbling stone tower or structure visible on the distant horizon
scattered evergreen trees on the snowy slopes in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the storm clears, the scene opens onto a wide mountain ridge bathed in the ethereal light of a massive crimson moon. The character pauses to look up at the celestial body before continuing. Distant pine trees and a ruined tower become visible on the horizon as the clouds dissipate.

events.description: large wolf emerges from the right side and walks parallel to the character
wolf approaches closer to the character from the right side

agents.ego_description: character continues walking but maintains awareness of the wolf approaching from the right

notable_agents.action: large wolf with glowing eyes walking parallel to the character and approaching cautiously from the right

entered.detail: large boulder or rock formation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy slope scattered with pine trees under the massive crimson moon. A large wolf emerges on the right and approaches cautiously, walking parallel to the character's path. The rocky cliffs of the pass have fallen behind, replaced by open slopes and boulders.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic blizzard that gradually opens into a vast, moonlit mountain landscape. It begins with an armored character navigating a narrow pass flanked by steep rocky cliffs, where dense storm clouds and swirling snow severely limit visibility. As the storm clears, the scene expands onto a wide mountain ridge, shifting from a dark gray palette to the ethereal glow of a massive crimson moon that reveals a distant ruined tower and pine trees. The camera then follows the character across open snowy slopes and boulders, leaving the narrow cliffs behind. Finally, the perspective shifts as a large wolf emerges from the right, cautiously approaching and walking parallel to the character under the crimson sky.
